This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. Provide helpful, relevant information that adds value to the conversation."},"item_number":{"type":["number","string"],"description":"The issue, pull request, or discussion number to comment on. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 123 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/123). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error."},"temporary_id":{"type":"string","pattern":"^aw_[A-Za-z0-9]{3,12}$","description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. 2026-03-31T03:12:52.6467062Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-03-31T03:12:52.6467474Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-31T03:12:52.6467646Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-31T03:12:52.6467901Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-31T03:12:52.6468364Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-31T03:12:52.6468520Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
